title: PixelPerfect Square Shadows
description: Fixes Vanilla round and inconsistent shadows to a clean 16x16 scale shadow!
body:
# PixelPerfect Shadows

## What's this?
Did you ever notice Minecraft's shadows is an round shape? Well no more. I have fully transformed shadows with a single png. Works on all entities that casts one.
## Features
- A whooping 1KB shadow.png file, extremely light. (0.1s)
- The edges are lighter and darker inward.
- Best with other Vanilla+ resourcepacks.
## Compatibility
Should work on all the previous version, shadow.png has been untouched for a very long time.
